cot_prefix: Okay, let's tackle this question. The passage is about Will Steger and his team going on a dogsled trip in the Arctic to show the effects of global warming. The main idea is that they're taking people there virtually to see the impact firsthand. The options are for a title. First, looking at the options: A) The Arctic Is In Danger – This is a possibility since the Arctic is affected by global warming. The passage mentions the changes in geography and the need to use flotation to reach the North Pole soon. But the story is more about showing the effects rather than just stating the Arctic is in danger. B) Discoveries of the Arctic – The passage isn't really about new discoveries but about documenting the effects of climate change. So B might not be the best fit. C) Sledding Through the Arctic – This is a literal description of what Steger is doing, but the main purpose is to highlight global warming. The sledding is the method, not the main
